channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mets Snap The 12-Game Skid and Juan Soto is Back. Now More Adversity Awaits.
item.description: The 12-game losing streak is done. Juan Soto is back. Francisco Lindor is out. Always something new with the Mets.

item.title: Kalshi Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Trade $10, Get a $10 Bonus on the 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: Kalshi Promo Code FOXSPORTS: Trade $10, Get a $10 Bonus on the 2026 NFL Draft.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft First Round Preview: Team Needs, Mock Picks, Draft Selections
item.description: How should each team approach the 2026 NFL Draft? Here the needs and picks for all 32 teams, and what we think each team should use their pick on.

item.title: Best Betting Sites for Round 1 of the NFL Draft
item.description: Check out the best betting sites for the NFL Draft.

item.title: Where Every 2026 UFL Star Played In College, Who Headlines Each Roster
item.description: FOX Sports' RJ Young rounded up where every active UFL player went to college and highlighting the stars you likely remember most.

item.title: Harper: Phillies must weather storm; Walker cut
item.description: Bryce Harper said the Phillies have "got to get through the mud" amid an eight-game losing streak that has resulted in the release of right-hander Tai...

item.title: OKC's Williams has Grade 1 strain, week-to-week
item.description: Oklahoma City Thunder forward Jalen Williams sustained a Grade 1 left hamstring strain and will be reevaluated on a weekly basis, the team announced o...

item.title: Potential No. 1 pick Dybantsa enters NBA draft
item.description: AJ Dybantsa, the projected No. 1 pick this summer, has declared for the 2026 NBA draft, he announced on YouTube.

item.title: Sources: Bucks finalizing deal to hire Jenkins
item.description: The Milwaukee Bucks are finalizing a deal to hire Taylor Jenkins as the franchise's new head coach, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

item.title: MLB Power Rankings: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 one month in
item.description: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 dominate our rankings four weeks into the 2026 season.
